71.explanation: Quảng cáo về Winford Gardens với "acres of outdoor gardens filled with plants you won't typically find anywhere near here" — tức một vườn thực vật (botanical garden).

72.explanation: Người nói cho biết "This weekend we will have an exhibition of Mexican blue palms" — các loại cây đặc biệt sẽ được trưng bày.

73.explanation: Câu "Winford's café is a converted building that used to be a greenhouse" cho thấy tòa nhà quán cà phê từng là nhà kính.

74.explanation: Người nói mở đầu "Welcome to this week's managers' meeting" và thông báo thay đổi cho các quản lý, cho thấy người nói là một quản lý.

75.explanation: Chủ đề chính là đánh giá hiệu suất: "we've always written performance evaluations for our drivers... we will use a software application... to enter performance appraisals".

76.explanation: Người nói yêu cầu "She will walk you through how to enroll in a training course... you will complete your enrollment by the end of this meeting" — đăng ký khóa đào tạo.

77.explanation: Người gọi nói "You're scheduled to move my furniture to my new apartment tomorrow" — nên đây là công ty chuyển nhà.

78.explanation: Sau khi báo "the freight elevator in my building is broken", câu "my apartment is on a very high floor" nhằm cảnh báo về tình huống khó khăn khi chuyển đồ.

79.explanation: Người nói cho biết "I have an overseas trip coming up next week" — tuần sau sẽ đi nước ngoài.

80.explanation: Tin xấu là "Lisa Gornicka informed me... she will not be able to perform tonight" — một nghệ sĩ sẽ không biểu diễn.

81.explanation: "Not only is Miss Marks familiar with the role of Laura, but she also knows the choreography" — bà đã có kinh nghiệm với vai diễn này.

82.explanation: Sau "I saw the reviews from Toronto", người nói khẳng định "I can guarantee that we are in for a treat" — hàm ý Rita Marks được khen ngợi về giọng hát.

83.explanation: Người nói đề cập "share customer information about our toys" và "the remote control car that we launched" — cho thấy làm việc tại nhà sản xuất đồ chơi.

84.explanation: "It's been a mixed bag" vì "customers love the smooth action... However, they are somewhat disappointed with the rechargeable battery" — phản hồi vừa tích cực vừa tiêu cực.

85.explanation: Người nói đề nghị "I encourage your team to find ways to make the battery charge faster and last longer" — cải thiện một bộ phận của sản phẩm.

86.explanation: Thông báo dành cho "ShopSmart shoppers" về "cans of ShopSmart soup or vegetables" — được phát tại siêu thị.

87.explanation: Chủ đề chính là "we are kicking off a ShopSmart giveaway event... entered in a drawing to win a gift certificate" — một chương trình tặng quà.

88.explanation: Người nói nhấn mạnh "This offer is good only for ShopSmart brand canned goods" — chỉ những sản phẩm này mới đủ điều kiện tham gia sự kiện.

89.explanation: Người gọi từ Silver's Flooring nói về "the maple floors that you wanted me to put in" — được thuê để lắp sàn.

90.explanation: "I just found out that the hardwood distributor has lowered the price of the oak flooring" — nhà phân phối đã giảm giá.

91.explanation: Người nói hoãn đặt hàng vì khách "originally preferred oak but decided it was too expensive" và giờ giá đã giảm — muốn khách cân nhắc lại quyết định.

92.explanation: Người nói chào đón "Welcome to the Central Valley Environmental Center" — là nhân viên tại trung tâm môi trường.

93.explanation: Dự án nhằm "install bluebird nest boxes... that will help protect our local bluebird population" — cung cấp nơi trú ẩn cho chim bluebird.

94.explanation: "Some suitable locations are already identified on the maps you've received" — bản đồ đánh dấu những vị trí có thể thực hiện công việc lắp hộp tổ.

95.explanation: Người nói cập nhật "sales of our lines of dishware" — công ty bán bộ đồ ăn (dishware).

96.explanation: "We spent a lot on the design for New Year, so our CEO will be happy to learn that the investment has paid off" — khoản đầu tư đã thành công.

97.explanation: Người nói yêu cầu "unless total sales reach those of our Café series" — theo bảng, mẫu Café có 2,000 đơn hàng, nên Harvest Festival phải đạt 2,000.

98.explanation: Người nói chào đón nhân viên mới "to your first day of work at the Wildcats' customer service office" và hướng dẫn cách tư vấn khách — là người đào tạo dịch vụ khách hàng.

99.explanation: "We expect ticket sales to be very good because the Wildcats had such a great season last year" — mùa giải trước của đội rất thành công.

100.explanation: Gói mới là "the new Sunday package"; theo bảng, Sunday package gồm 16 trận.

transcripts.text:
Questions 71 through 73 refer to the following advertisement.

Looking for an interesting activity to celebrate the coming of spring? Winford Gardens offers an escape filled with calm, peace, and quiet, just a few miles from the downtown area. Winford Gardens has acres of outdoor gardens filled with plants you won't typically find anywhere near here. This weekend, we will have an exhibition of Mexican blue palms. If you have never seen these striking and unique plants, now is your chance. Winford's café is a converted building that used to be a greenhouse. The surrounding tropical plants and flowers help make dining there a pleasure.

Questions 74 through 76 refer to the following excerpt from a meeting.

Good afternoon. Welcome to this week's managers' meeting here at South Truck Deliveries. As you know, we've always written performance evaluations for our drivers and other employees on paper. I am pleased to announce some important changes beginning this year. We will use a software application called Personnel Profile to enter performance appraisals. Let me introduce Ms. Yiyoung Lee, the head of our IT department. She will walk you through how to enroll in a training course on using Personnel Profile, and you will complete your enrollment by the end of this meeting.

Questions 77 through 79 refer to the following telephone message.

Hi, this is Ms. Mitra. You're scheduled to move my furniture to my new apartment tomorrow morning at eight. I'm calling because I just learned that the freight elevator in my building is broken, and my apartment is on a very high floor. I will check first thing tomorrow morning to see what the situation is, but please give me a call as soon as you can. I have an overseas trip coming up next week, so this work will have to happen soon.

Questions 80 through 82 refer to the following announcement.

Good evening, everyone. Welcome to a new season of City Opera. I bring some bad news. I'm afraid soprano Lisa Gornicka informed me earlier today that she will not be able to perform tonight. I know how disappointing this is, but I also have good news. Soprano Rita Marks is in town and has agreed to step in for Ms. Gornicka. Not only is Ms. Marks familiar with the role of Laura, but she also knows the choreography, since she worked with our director when this production premiered in Toronto. Wondering what her voice is like? Well, judge for yourself, but I saw the reviews from Toronto. I can guarantee that we are in for a treat.

Questions 83 through 85 refer to the following excerpt from a meeting.

Thank you for inviting me and other members of the marketing department to this meeting of the research and development team. We always welcome the opportunity to share customer information about our toys with you. I'd like to start off with some information about the remote control car that we launched in department stores and toy stores one month ago. It's been a mixed bag. Customers love the smooth action of the car and the high speed it can achieve. However, they are somewhat disappointed with the rechargeable battery the car comes with. I encourage your team to find ways to make the battery charge faster and last longer.

Questions 86 through 88 refer to the following announcement.

Attention, ShopSmart shoppers. In case you didn't pick up our flyer, we are kicking off a ShopSmart giveaway event. For every two cans of ShopSmart soup or vegetables that you buy, you will be entered in a drawing to win a gift certificate that can be used at any ShopSmart location. Gift certificates worth $100 each will be awarded to three lucky shoppers on May 1. This offer is good only for ShopSmart brand canned goods. Act now—stock up and join the giveaway. The more you buy, the more chances you have to win.

Questions 89 through 91 refer to the following telephone message.

Hi, Mr. Collins. I'm calling from Silver's Flooring. I was about to place your order for the maple floors that you wanted me to put in, but I decided to call you first. I just found out that the hardwood distributor has lowered the price of the oak flooring. I think you originally preferred oak but decided it was too expensive. The reduction looks to be about 15 percent. Please call me back and let me know if I should still order the maple for you, or if you would prefer that I order the oak.

Questions 92 through 94 refer to the following introduction.

Welcome to the Central Valley Environmental Center. We are so grateful to all of you, our volunteers, for coming out today to help with this project to install bluebird nest boxes. The eastern bluebird is a native species that plays an important role in our environment, but it's threatened by habitat loss and predation. We have numerous donated nest boxes here that will help protect our local bluebird population. Remember that bluebirds prefer open woodlands and grasslands with scattered trees. Some suitable locations are already identified on the maps you've received.

Questions 95 through 97 refer to the following talk and list.

Hi, everyone. I want to update you on sales of our lines of dishware after the introduction of our holiday-themed patterns. Our Everyday dishware continues to perform as expected. Also, I'm pleased to report that our New Year plates are a resounding success. Total wholesale orders have outpaced those of our popular Dawn series of fine china. We spent a lot on the design for New Year, so our CEO will be happy to learn that the investment has paid off. Looks like we will need to rethink the Harvest Festival brand, though. Unless total sales reach those of our Café series by next year, we may even discontinue it.

Questions 98 through 100 refer to the following excerpt from a meeting and chart.

I'd like to welcome all of you to your first day of work at the Wildcats' customer service office. Baseball season starts in exactly one month. We expect ticket sales to be very good because the Wildcats had such a great season last year. As you can see on the chart, we have four packages. Make sure you let our customers know about the new Sunday package. It includes tickets for every Sunday home game throughout the season. Our Friday night package, holiday package, and discount package were available last year and should remain popular.
